---
title: "France"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

Info on MSP input for France

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src=""></iframe>
```

:::
